question: How can I change the application port when running nomad-distro-dev?
proposed_answer: You can modify the start command and pass an `--app-port` argument

question: How can I ensure a parser creates a precursor entry only if it doesn't exist?
proposed_answer: Check if a file with the given name already exists in the upload and create it only if not present. For example, derive a filename from the precursor_id (e.g. `{precursor_id}.archive.json`) and create the entry when missing.
id: Create multiple entry from parser or new entry in normalizer|2025-06-14T07:31:20.113000Z|d0601e3fab|q68-a69-70

question: Is the image used in the docker compose file using your repository's image?
proposed_answer: The compose `image:` should point to your repo image rather than the `fairmat-nfdi/nomad-distro-template:main` template image.

question: Is there a more automated and efficient way to test schemas with the web-ui?
proposed_answer: Use the API directly to upload files programmatically — you only need an API token and uploads endpoints to run repeatable tests instead of the UI.
id: .hdf5 files (own made .h5, .h5iona, ...) for publication on central nomad|2025-05-21T06:40:45.023000Z|405ef159e3|q1-a3-4

question: How can I make chemical_formula searchable with the Elements / Formula filter?
proposed_answer: Store or normalize the chemical formula into the `results` section (or use a normalizer that writes a searchable results quantity). The GUI filters rely on normalized result quantities — using `data` alone may not make the value searchable in the Elements/Formula filter.
id: .hdf5 files (own made .h5, .h5iona, ...) for publication on central nomad|2025-05-21T06:40:45.023000Z|405ef159e3|q9-a10-11

question: Can pinning Python help fixing setup errors in `nomad-distro-dev`?
proposed_answer: Yes. Pinning or installing a particular Python patch (for example 3.12.8) and re-running the setup (e.g., `uv python install 3.12.8` or `uv python pin 3.12.8` then `uv run poe setup`) often resolves these environment-related errors.

question: GET request on processing upload corrupts it — any workaround?
proposed_answer: Try to reproduce with a minimal working example; as a pragmatic workaround add a short sleep in the upload flow to avoid race conditions. Also collect app/worker logs to help trace the issue.
id: GET request on processing upload corrupts it|2024-08-20T05:49:44.814000Z|ea7351ce1e|q15-a16-17

question: Unable to pull `jboss/keycloak` when running `docker compose pull` — how to fix?
proposed_answer: Switch to the maintained Keycloak image (for example `quay.io/keycloak/keycloak:16.1.1`) or update your compose to the image recommended in the Keycloak docs; check Oasis migration instructions for recent changes.
id: Unable to pull `jboss/keycloak` when running `docker compose pull` on my NOMAD Oasis|2024-03-14T16:47:18.591000Z|c1766fe61c|q6-a7-8

question: How to speed up local nomad-distro-dev startup?
proposed_answer: Reduce the number of plugins enabled in the local distro or start only the required services — default setups include many plugins that slow down startup.
id: runing nomad dev distro taking ~3 min to load|2024-11-28T16:25:22.079000Z|34153e48cf|q3-a5-7

question: How to trigger reprocessing of an unpublished upload via the API?
proposed_answer: Call the uploads action endpoint `/uploads/{upload_id}/action/process` to request reprocessing programmatically.
id: Trigger unpublished upload reprocessing with the API?|2025-07-10T12:37:04.381000Z|bccb1bfe23|q0-a1-2

question: What happens to VASP POTCAR files on upload?
proposed_answer: NOMAD extracts important metadata into `POTCAR.stripped` to respect licensing and removes the original POTCAR file from the upload so published data remain compliant.
id: What happens to the VASP POTCAR upon upload?|2024-08-29T07:38:20.591000Z|c039d98db7|q36-a39-40

question: How to handle h5grove URL encoding/UI issues?
proposed_answer: Upgrade or pin `h5grove` to a version containing the encoding fix (the issue is tracked in nomad-FAIR issue tracker); then restart the app to apply the fix.
id: NOMAD can't deal with ISO8601 time formats?|2024-03-15T07:54:51.424000Z|7937b7ad2b|q6-a9-10

question: How to rebase inside a plugin folder in a distro repo?
proposed_answer: `cd packages/<plugin>` and run the usual git commands (`git rebase`, `git pull`, `git checkout`) — working inside the subfolder operates on that plugin repository.

question: Is there a recommended place to check system dependency versions not in pyproject?
proposed_answer: Check the distro/documentation pages (for example the setup/howto pages and templates) — they document external system dependency guidance such as docker, keycloak and other infra prerequisites.
